channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in All Languages (Daily)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo daily.

item.title: 🟦 code-yeongyu/not-claude-code-emulator (134 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: code-yeongyu

📝 Repository: code-yeongyu/not-claude-code-emulator

📄 Descrizione: ULTRA DANGEROUS CLAUDE CODE EMULATOR; MAKING THE API REQUEST IDENTICAL TO CLAUDE CODE

📜 Licenza: No license

]]>
